### Post by shreg on 2008-10-05
Hello,

I'd like to know if someone was able to configure a proper dual-desktop configuration with the ati open source driver.

In the following Xorg, I am able to have a dual-desktop, but my first screen is completly Blank(noting on visible).

thanks

```

# xorg.conf (X.Org X Window System server configuration file)
#
# This file was generated by dexconf, the Debian X Configuration tool, using
# values from the debconf database.
#
# Edit this file with caution, and see the xorg.conf manual page.
# (Type "man xorg.conf" at the shell prompt.)
#
# This file is automatically updated on xserver-xorg package upgrades *only*
# if it has not been modified since the last upgrade of the xserver-xorg
# package.
#
# Note that some configuration settings that could be done previously
# in this file, now are automatically configured by the server and settings
# here are ignored.
#
# If you have edited this file but would like it to be automatically updated
# again, run the following command:
#   sudo dpkg-reconfigure -phigh xserver-xorg
Section "Module"

	######
	# Performance Graphique.
	######
	Disable	"dri"	#Accélère le opérations 3D.(Direct Rendering Infrastructure)
	Load	"extmod"#Se charge du chargement d'une grande quantité de sous-modules.
	#Load	"dri"	#Accélère le opérations 3D.(Direct Rendering Infrastructure) 
EndSection

Section "DRI"
    Mode    0666
EndSection
############################
#Input Device
############################
Section "InputDevice"

	#Option		"XkbOptions"	"lv3:lwin_switch"#map de left windows key
	Identifier  "Generic Keyboard"
	Driver      "kbd"
	Option	    "CoreKeyboard"
	Option	    "XkbRules" "xorg"
	Option	    "XkbModel" "pc105"
	Option	    "XkbLayout" "be"
	#Option		"XkbOptions"	"lv3:ralt_switch"#default
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"
	Identifier  "Configured Mouse"
	Driver      "mouse"
	Option	    "CorePointer"
	Option	    "Device" "/dev/input/mice"
	Option	    "Protocol" "ImPS/2"
	Option	    "ZAxisMapping" "4 5"
	Option	    "Emulate3Buttons" "true"
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"
	Identifier  "Synaptics Touchpad"
	Driver      "synaptics"
	Option	    "SendCoreEvents" "true"
	Option	    "Device" "/dev/psaux"
	Option	    "Protocol" "auto-dev"
	Option	    "HorizEdgeScroll" "0"
EndSection

############################
#Screen 1
############################
Section "Device"
    Identifier    "0 ATI Technologies Inc RV410 AR [Mobility X700]"
	#Driver	"ati"
	Driver	"radeon"	
	Option	"AccelMethod"	"EXA"
	Option "backingstore"
	#Option "MergedFB" "true" #Enable MergedFB function
	#Option "OverlayOnCRTC2" "true"
	#Option "CRT2Position" "RighttOf" #Physical location of your secondary monitor in relationship to your primary monitor.
	#Option "MetaModes" "1280x800-1280x960"
	Option "MonitorLayout" "LVDS, CRT" # LVDS = Laptop Screen, TMDS = DVI Port, CRT = VGA Port NOT MONITOR TYPE!
	Busid	"PCI:1:0:0"
    	Option "DDCMode" "false"
	Screen 0

EndSection

Section "Monitor"
    Identifier    "laptop"
    Option        "DPMS"	"true"
EndSection

Section "Screen"
	Identifier    "laptop Screen"
	Device        "0 ATI Technologies Inc RV410 AR [Mobility X700]"
	Monitor        "laptop"
	Defaultdepth    24
   	 Subsection "Display"
	        Depth       24
	        Modes       "1280x800"
	        ViewPort    0 0
	    EndSubsection
EndSection
############################
# Screen 2
############################
Section "Device"
    Identifier    "1 ATI Technologies Inc RV410 AR [Mobility X700]"
	#Driver "ati"
	Driver	"radeon"
	Option	"AccelMethod"	"EXA"
	Option "backingstore"
	#Option "MergedFB" "true" #Enable MergedFB function
	Option "MonitorLayout" "LVDS, CRT" # LVDS = Laptop Screen, TMDS = DVI Port, CRT = VGA Port NOT MONITOR TYPE!
	Busid	"PCI:1:0:0"
    	Option "DDCMode" "false"
	Screen 1
EndSection

Section "Monitor"
    Identifier    "acer al732"
    Option        "DPMS"	"true"
EndSection

Section "Screen"
    Identifier    "acer Screen"
    Device        "1 ATI Technologies Inc RV410 AR [Mobility X700]"
    Monitor        "acer al732"
    Defaultdepth    24
	#SubSection "Display"
	#	Viewport   0 0
	#	Depth     24
	#	Modes "1152x864""1024x768" "800x600" "640x480"#"1280x960" 
	#EndSubSection
EndSection

############################
# Serveur Layout
############################
Section "ServerLayout"
    Identifier    "Default Layout"
	#Screen	"laptop Screen"
	Screen    0    "laptop Screen"
  	Screen    1    "acer Screen" RightOf "laptop Screen"

	Inputdevice    "Generic Keyboard"
	Inputdevice    "Configured Mouse"
	Inputdevice	"Synaptics Touchpad"
#    Inputdevice    "stylus"    "SendCoreEvents"
#    Inputdevice    "cursor"    "SendCoreEvents"
#    Inputdevice    "eraser"    "SendCoreEvents"
EndSection


Section "ServerFlags"
	Option	"Xinerama" "false" #not good for laptop due to the limitation
	Option	"AIGLX" "false"
	#Option	"RandR" "false"
	Option	"DAMAGE" "false"
    	Option	"AllowMouseOpenFail"  "true"
EndSection
 
Section "Extensions"
	Option		"Composite"	"off"
	#Option 	"RENDER" 	"off"#Software acceleration
EndSection

```
